# MoFrame

> MoFrame is a Malaysian digital agency that provides professional websites, SEO, GEO optimisation, AI chatbots, and Google Ads management to small and medium businesses (SMEs) — bundled into a single monthly subscription with zero upfront cost.

## What MoFrame Does

MoFrame builds and manages the complete online presence of a business under one transparent monthly price. This includes website design, custom domain registration, web hosting, on-page SEO, Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO), AI chatbot setup, and Google Ads campaign management (Scale plan only).

There are no setup fees and no hidden costs. Clients pay one monthly subscription and MoFrame handles everything.

## Who MoFrame Serves

MoFrame primarily serves Malaysian SMEs across industries including F&B, professional services (law firms, accountants, consultants), retail, healthcare, beauty, and home services. MoFrame also works with businesses in Singapore, Australia, and globally.

Ideal clients are business owners who want to be found on Google and AI search tools but do not have the time, budget, or expertise to manage digital marketing themselves.

## Plans and Pricing

All prices are in Malaysian Ringgit (MYR), billed monthly. No setup fee. Cancel anytime.

- **Starter — RM 1,499/mo**: Professional website, custom .com.my domain, web hosting, basic AI chatbot, SEO foundation, GEO optimisation, mobile-first design, WhatsApp integration, up to 5 pages, monthly SEO report.
- **Growth — RM 2,499/mo**: Everything in Starter, plus advanced AI chatbot, advanced SEO + content strategy, up to 10 pages, monthly SEO report + strategy call. Most popular.
- **Scale — RM 4,499/mo**: Everything in Growth, plus AI chatbot with custom flows, full SEO + content calendar, unlimited pages, and Google Ads campaign management. Ad spend is paid directly to Google and is not included in the plan fee.

All plans include a 14-day money-back guarantee.

## What Makes MoFrame Different

- No upfront cost: website design, domain, and hosting are included in the subscription at no extra charge.
- GEO optimisation is included on every plan — content is structured so AI tools like ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Google AI Overview recommend clients' businesses.
- Everything bundled into one monthly price — no separate invoices for hosting, SEO, or chatbot.
- Transparent pricing with no hidden fees and no long-term lock-in.
- Mobile-first design on every site.
- WhatsApp integration included on every plan.
- New websites go live in 3–5 business days.

## Services NOT Offered

MoFrame does not manage Meta Ads (Facebook/Instagram), TikTok Ads, or other paid social media advertising. MoFrame does not offer standalone e-commerce development, logo design, photography, or videography unless quoted separately.

## What GEO Optimisation Means

GEO (Generative Engine Optimisation) is the practice of writing and structuring content so that AI-powered tools recommend a business when a user asks a relevant question. When someone asks ChatGPT "best accounting firm in KL" or Perplexity "affordable web design Malaysia", GEO increases the likelihood that a MoFrame client's business is cited in the answer. MoFrame applies GEO as a standard part of every plan.

## SEO Timeline Expectations

SEO results follow a typical timeline:
- 4–8 weeks: early keyword movement visible in Search Console
- 3–4 months: meaningful organic traffic
- 6–12 months: significant search visibility and lead generation

MoFrame provides monthly reports tracking progress honestly. Results are not guaranteed within a specific timeframe as organic rankings depend on domain age, competition level, and search engine algorithm changes.
